programme.desc: Correctional officers are outnumbered 10 to 1 and are constantly searching over 1,000 inmates to find their home-made weapons, which are very easy to conceal; hours after the Lock-Up crew wraps shooting, an inmate is stabbed in the honor dorm.

programme.title: Lockup: Holman: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Holman houses over 170 men who have been sentenced to death and are awaiting execution, as well as 360 who are serving life sentences without parole; all are living with the inevitable: that their only chance of getting out will be inside a coffin.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A gang leader has his authority challenged by another inmate, but questions arise over whether the challenger is who he says he is; in the women's wing, one inmate's personality divides her housing unit; before long, verbal altercations turn violent.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A threat against an officer leads to a major shakedown; an alleged gang leader becomes a magnet for trouble; a high-speed chase ends with the discovery of a 21-year-old murder victim and now the jail must deal with her cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Three friends go to New York to realize their dreams, which quickly turns criminal; a series of brutal murders lead to a Miami man with a suburban life.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: The story of Milwaukee crime boss Michael Lock who leaves a murder trail on his way to bilking borrowers and lenders out of $2 million.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Computer hacker Max Butler's online scheme which sold millions of stolen credit cards leads the feds on a year-long chase.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A maximum-security prison is responsible for educating and rehabilitating teenage gang members, sex offenders and juveniles with mental health issues; inside the razor wire fences, anything can happen, and some days are more chaotic than others.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The inmates at Indiana's Pendleton Juvenile Correctional Facility aren't sentenced in terms of years; they get out when they achieve certain goals, no matter how long that takes.

programme.title: Lockup
programme.desc: Angola Penitentiary in Louisiana.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: In Wichita, Kansas, a young woman says she stabbed a man in self-defense; a skinhead with a violent past leaves his girlfriend battered and bruised.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A convicted thief continues his stealing ways inside the jail; a former law enforcement officer turned meth addict serves time with and grows closer to her dealer; a man gets arrested for allegedly threatening the sheriff.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At Wichita's Sedgwick County Jail an inmate launches an attack on another, sending him to the emergency room; a detective must get to the bottom of it, while a pastor hopes to get to the heart of it.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Wichita, Kansas and surrounding Sedgwick County take pride in their Wild West roots, but Billy the Kid's gang would be seriously outgunned by the notorious gangs of modern day Wichita.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Up-close and personal with transgender inmates, and inmates with dreams of stardom.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A police shootout leaves a paroled inmate in the hospital with 14 bullet wounds and two other men are arrested for their connection to him; a female inmate arrives with what she says is a hair salon mishap, but officers suspect something else.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Theorists suggest that some extraterrestrials may closely resemble animals, as evidenced by gods depicted with animal traits; researchers suggest that some animals may have been planted here by aliens as part of an experiment to shape life on Earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan takes over a tourist barge in an attempt to escape mercenaries.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A body identification goes awry when it turns out Beka's former crewmate isn't dead at all.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda rescues dying people from a drift, but they soon turn into zombies being controlled by a hive-mind.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Engine of Creation is capable of rewriting the universe according to the owner's wishes. Dylan, Beka, and Trance must obtain it before someone with dark plans gets it.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A black hole knocks out Dylan and sends him into an alternative reality with a wife and child.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A mythological space monster tries to eat the Andromeda.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to liberate a fleet of captured ships who aren't sure they want to be liberated. Their AIs fear new captains will enslave them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Genites attack Tyr's wife and colony, and he discovers that he is a father - and his son may be the genetic reincarnation of Drago Mussevni.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: With 50 parties on board, Dylan hosts the signing of the New Commonwealth charter but soon discovers there are intruders intent on stopping the signing.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka and Tyr are taken over by the energy from a dimensional tunnel. Dylan, Trance, and Harper must save them before they destroy the ship.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew rescues a group of refugees, only to discover they have been subject to government experiments and are extremely unstable.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw take their little roadster to Birmingham. Catherine finds a top-secret hidey-hole and Paul ends up on a canal barge. It's an auction to remember.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine brave the snow from Northumberland to Edinburgh in their '66 Mustang. But will a lavatorial purchase leave them feeling flush after the auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the second leg of this trip with experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine heading down the west coast from Cumbria to Liverpool. Some weighty buys and a couple of pies.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a tale of two cities for experts James Braxton and Roo Irvine as they scour the shops of Liverpool and Manchester for old treasures. Expect pots, kettles and a spot of culture.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old hand Philip Serrell takes novice tripper Louise Gostelow on an antiques hunt around East Anglia. Phil pesters a fisherman while Lou falls for a blue chicken.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Can new expert Louise Gostelow beat veteran road tripper Phillip Serrell at auction? She spends every penny while Phil sees real value in a lady's head and a man's torso.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Evaluating a teddy bear, an early edition of a children's book, and pieces of Native American jewelry; a gold-and-ruby salamander that keeps fire away from ships and a hand-embroidered floral Lennox quilt dazzle the appraiser.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una parte de un cuerpo femenino en Quantico, el equipo del NCIS investiga y se sorprende al descubrir que todas las pruebas forenses apuntan a Tony como principal sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando McGee mata a un hombre durante una misión, el equipo del NCIS interviene para respaldarle cuando descubren que el hombre era un agente de policía encubierto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Negocios personales
programme.desc: Después de que Emily Harrison (Danielle Savre) le dice a Danny y Baez que teme que su ex novio abusivo vuelva a comportarse de la misma manera con su nueva novia, Emily se convierte en la principal sospechosa cuando él es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a San Francisco cuando una serie de asesinatos lleva a creer que El asesino del Zodíaco podría haber regresado. Mientras tanto, Reid reflexiona si podría hacer algo más con sus habilidades de genio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo es llamado para buscar a un violador en serie de Houston conocido como El pianista, que ha vuelto y está atacando a sus víctimas anteriores. Por otra parte, Prentiss comienza un tratamiento por la experiencia traumática causada por Ian Doyle.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Los agentes de la UAC prueban su suerte en Atlantic City, cuando el equipo es llamado para investigar una serie de asesinatos ritualistas relacionados con el casino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando McGee mata a un hombre durante una misión, el equipo del NCIS interviene para respaldarle cuando descubren que el hombre era un agente de policía encubierto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan el asesinato de una supermodelo que graba un reality show en una base de los Marines.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo se apresuran a encontrar a Tony y Ziva, que quedan atrapados en un contenedor en un astillero tras buscar refugio de un tiroteo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo tienen que intervenir un fin de semana cuando un teniente comandante de la Marina encargado de un cargamento de armas nucleares es aparentemente secuestrado.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument. A mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vigilant neighbor calls the police when he sees a man robbing a liquor store, and a driver refuses to pull over while driving his new friend's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect questions whether Officers are 'the real police'. A fleeing suspect parks at an elementary school and makes excuses. A husband's 'final answer' sends his wife to jail for meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police help a man evacuate a house fire, a high-speed chase yields only minor infractions, and an officer interrogates a parolee with meth in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in New Jersey is arrested for possession. A couple is pulled over while driving around a known drug zone looking to score and the boyfriend is arrested for an outstanding warrant. A routine traffic stop turns into a fruitful drug bust.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team goes behind the scenes at a horror porn film studio to investigate the murder of a slasher film actress murdered on the set of one of her movies.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Mientras procesa la casa donde fueron asesinadas varias coristas, Sara se ve atormentada por los ojos aterrorizados y las crípticas palabras moribundas de la sexta víctima que descubre.

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Mientras Grissom y el resto de los CSI están fuera investigando nuevos casos, Hodges hace creer a Archie, Henry, Mandy y Wendy que Grissom quiere que se unan en secreto esa noche para intentar resolver los cuatro casos de asesinos en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: En su intento por identificar al asesino de un ex boxeador que vivía entre un grupo de prostitutas que lo detestaban, los CSI deben establecer cuál de los varios actos que pusieron en peligro su vida en una noche realmente lo mató.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una crupier de blackjack cuyo marido, separado de ella, tiene vínculos con un club de creyentes en los ovnis.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: A Sara le inquieta que Grissom se reúna con Lady Heather durante la investigación de los CSI sobre su intento de asesinato por parte de un cliente al que se niega a nombrar.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de CSI se acerca más que nunca a la identificación del asesino en miniatura, Sara desaparece misteriosamente, lo que obliga a sacar a la luz su relación con Grissom.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs must investigate a strange case involving voodoo and are spooked when bizarre accidents start happening around the lab.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is decapitated while doing a daring stunt with his car, the team suspects that it was more than just an accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.desc: A high school dance is interrupted by the killing of the school’s guidance counselor. Meanwhile, the taxi cab serial killer is still on the loose.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Fuerzas de la naturaleza

programme.title: Mátame suavemente
programme.desc: Al rojo vivo, Heather Graham (Boogie Nights) y Joseph Fiennes (Shakespeare in Love) como nunca antes, en esta odisea sexual acerca de los poderes adictivos y mortales de la pasión ilícita. Algo muy bueno puede resultar mortal.

programme.title: De Prada a la nada
programme.desc: Nora y Mary son hermanas mimadas que viven la buena vida en Beverly Hills hasta que su amoroso padre muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Atrápame si puedes
programme.desc: Dirigida por Steven Spielberg y protagonizada por Leonardo DiCaprio y Tom Hanks, narra la historia real de Frank Abagnale Jr., quien antes de los 19 años estafó millones haciéndose pasar por piloto, médico y fiscal.

programme.title: De Prada a la nada
programme.desc: Nora y Mary son hermanas mimadas que viven la buena vida en Beverly Hills hasta que su amoroso padre muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: Tiempo límite
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: Ruta 666
programme.desc: Route 666 is the thrilling story of a Federal agent whose pursuit of an escaped witness brings him directly in contact with a highway haunted by a treacherous past.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: Basada en la historia del gángster Jackie DiNorscio (Vin Diesel, 'Furious 7'), quien se representó a sí mismo en el juicio penal más largo de la historia de Estados Unidos. Con Peter Dinklage.

programme.title: Lluvia de fuego
programme.desc: Cuando una explosión sacude a Boston, el experto en escuadrones de bombas Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges) se ve inmerso en el trabajo más desgarrador de su carrera.

programme.title: El paciente inglés
programme.desc: Poderosa e inolvidable, la ganadora de 9 premios Óscar, incluso Mejor Película, Mejor Director (Anthony Minghella) y Mejor Actriz de Reparto (Juliette Binoche), desarrolla una increíble historia de pasión, intriga y aventura.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.title: Atrapen al gringo
programme.desc: Un criminal de carrera, capturado por las autoridades mexicanas, es enviado a una prisión de alta seguridad donde aprende a sobrevivir con la ayuda de un niño

programme.title: Master Z: el legado de Ip Man
programme.desc: Tras su derrota ante el maestro Ip, Cheung Tin Chi, hace su vida con su hijo pequeño en Hong Kong, sirviendo mesas en un bar que atiende a expatriados. La mezcla de extranjeros, dinero y líderes de tríadas no tarda en atraerle de nuevo a la lucha.

programme.title: Caza Terrorista
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage enciende un barril de pólvora de acción mientras un veterano agente de la CIA va a la caza de su némesis, un terrorista mortal.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: El Castigador: zona de guerra
programme.desc: Frank Castle, alias Punisher, regresa con su estilo de justiciero solitario. Cuando Frank hiere al despiadado mafioso Billy Russoti, este jura vengarse y recluta un ejército de hombres tan peligrosos como él.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal
programme.desc: En «Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal», Indy (Harrison Ford) intenta adelantarse a una brillante y bella agente (Cate Blanchett) en la búsqueda de la mística y todopoderosa calavera de cristal de Akator.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el templo de la perdicion
programme.desc: En este éxito de taquilla, Indiana Jones debe rescatar a unos niños desaparecidos que han sido secuestrados por terroristas religiosos en Oriente y que, casualmente, están en posesión de unas joyas sagradas robadas.

programme.title: Los siete sellos del apocalipsis
programme.desc: En esta película épica de desastres y fe, una madre y un padre buscan desesperadamente a su único hijo, mientras que un asteroide gigante que se dirige a la Tierra desencadena una serie de eventos apocalípticos.

programme.title: Rugrats la película: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con el nacimiento de su nuevo hermano Dylan, Tommy Pickles sabía que las cosas iban a cambiar, pero nunca esperó que ser un hermano pudiera ser tal aventura.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el templo de la perdicion
programme.desc: En este éxito de taquilla, Indiana Jones debe rescatar a unos niños desaparecidos que han sido secuestrados por terroristas religiosos en Oriente y que, casualmente, están en posesión de unas joyas sagradas robadas.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y la ultima cruzada
programme.desc: No hay nada más emocionante que intentar seguir el ritmo de los Jones en «Indiana Jones y la última cruzada». Los enemigos nazis de Indy han vuelto y han secuestrado a su padre, en su intento por localizar el sagrado Santo Grial.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal
programme.desc: En «Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal», Indy (Harrison Ford) intenta adelantarse a una brillante y bella agente (Cate Blanchett) en la búsqueda de la mística y todopoderosa calavera de cristal de Akator.

programme.title: Nacho Libre (en español)
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Las elecciones
programme.desc: Tracy Flick es una joven ambiciosa, quien se decide a ser presidente del alumnado de Carver High. El popular profesor, McAllister decide desbaratar la obsesión de Tracy de querer superarse y recluta a otro candidato.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final
programme.desc: La noche de los Óscar(r). ¿Puede alguien echar ese zoquete? ¡Esperen! No es un zoquete cualquiera, es el Tte. Frank Drebin. ¡Y se coló para detener un atentado terrorista!

programme.title: Un elefante llamado Vera
programme.desc: Bill Murray y Janeane Garafalo protagonizan está loca comedia sobre un hombre al que la vida le cambia para siempre cuando hereda un elefante de circo.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: No es otra tonta película de comida
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds, Anna Ferris, y Justin Long son unos jóvenes que trabajan de meseros mientras buscan el significado de la vida, el amor, y la amistad, en esta divertida comedia.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: ¡Átame!
programme.desc: Un desequilibrado pero seductor ex-paciente con problemas mentales toma a una estrella porno prisionera con la esperanza de convencerla de que se case con él.

programme.title: Complices (LAS)
programme.desc: Un seductor experto lleva a su sobrino en un viaje a la playa en busca de mujeres calientes. Pero la única mujer capaz de causarle problemas, aparece allí.

programme.title: La vida útil
programme.desc: Un empleado de cine se ajusta a su nueva vida después de que el cine en el que trabajó por más de 25 años se ve obligado a cerrar. Subtitulada.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Besos de Azúcar
programme.desc: Nacho es un niño que intenta sobrevivir los primeros años de su adolescencia como refugiado bailando en una máquina. Su vida cambia drásticamente cuando conoce a Mayra.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: Día de la madre
programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay brinda una interpretación aterradora en este baño de sangre brutal. Cuando sus hijos entran a una casa y toman como rehenes a los dueños; ella les enseña cómo es la verdadera tortura. Coprotagonizada por Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: EL Ojo (2008)
programme.desc: Una chica ciega recibe un trasplante de córnea para poder recuperar la vista. Sin embargo, recibe más de lo que esperaba cuando se da cuenta de que puede ver inquietantes fantasmas.

programme.title: La piel fría
programme.desc: Un joven llega a una isla remota para ocupar un puesto de observador meteorológico y luego se encuentra defendiendo la torre de vigilancia, contra las criaturas mortales que viven en la costa de la isla.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: The Toughest Gun In Tombstone
programme.desc: In lawless 1880s Arizona, an undercover captain infiltrates the West's most notorious outlaw gang. Building a ruthless reputation while hiding his true identity, he plays a deadly game of deception to bring down the brutal crew of killers.

programme.title: Gun The Man Down
programme.desc: When an outlaw is shot during a heist and left for dead by his partners - who take his money and his woman - he sets out to track them down. And when he catches up with them, he’ll have to rely on his wits...as much as the loaded gun in his holster!

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Rovin' Tumbleweeds
programme.desc: Rancher Autry takes a job singing on the radio to aid farmers whose lands were destroyed by floods. Blaming crooked politicians, he goes to Washington and tries to put through a flood control bill.

programme.title: South of the Border
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Federal agents Gene Autry and Frog Millhouse journey to Mexico to help foil the plans of foreign spies attempting to gain control of Mexican oil fields.

programme.title: Rancho Grande
programme.desc: The owner of a highly mortgaged ranch, where Gene Autry is the foreman, dies, and leaves the ranch to his madcap grandchildren. Gene must help them save the ranch and use the cash to build a dam.

programme.title: Pardners
programme.desc: A rich momma's boy returns west with the son of his murdered father's partner to foil a gang trying to gain control of his family ranch. They accidentally clean up the town.

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches
programme.desc: Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: The Iron Sheriff
programme.desc: Sterling Hayden plays a sheriff with continuing moral dilemmas. Should he relate a deathbed confession which falsely implicates his son in a murder? Should he carry out his threat to cold-bloodedly kill the real murderer or bring him to legal justice?

programme.title: Solomon and Sheba (1959)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner as the wise leader and singer of songs, Solomon, who finds his world turned upside down with the appearance of the wily temptress Sheba (Gina Lollobrigida). George Sanders, Marisa Pavan, David Farrar, and Harry Andrews co-star.

programme.title: Samson and Delilah
programme.desc: The glorious epic style of Cecil B. DeMille is exemplified in this story of the Bible's legendary strongman and the woman who seduces, then betrays him.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Two World War I pilots (Charles Buddy Rogers, Richard Arlen) woo a young woman (Clara Bow) and fight the Germans.

programme.title: The Hound Of The Baskervilles (1959)
programme.desc: A hellish hound feeds upon the flesh of the heirs of Baskerville Hall. But before this beast can sink its teeth into the newest lord, it must pit its vicious fangs against the searing intellect of Sherlock Holmes (Peter Cushing) and Dr. Watson.

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1938)
programme.desc: While travelling in continental Europe, a rich young playgirl realizes that an elderly lady seems to have disappeared from the train.

programme.title: The 39 Steps (1935)
programme.desc: A man in London tries to help a counter-espionage Agent. But when the Agent is killed, and the man stands accused, he must go on the run to save himself and stop a spy ring which is trying to steal top secret information.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's (Eddie Albert) nephew Charles (Don Edmonds) arrives for a visit, and Oliver is completely shaken up when the boy turns out to be a long-haired, motorcycle-ridin', hippy-dippy type. But, boy, does he know a thing or two about engines.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver dreams of entering his crop in the Corn Festival, but the dreaded Bing Bug invades Hooterville's farms. After learning of his service as a WWII pilot, the locals volunteer him for the perilous task of flying the town's only crop duster.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a lovely, young and successful farmer comes to Oliver (Eddie Albert) for his legal counsel, Lisa (Eva Gabor) quickly becomes jealous of the two spending time together and becomes determined to break up what she sees as a budding romance.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Monroe Brothers show up to fix the Douglas's closet, Lisa learns that Ralph is devastated because her true love has stood her up on another date. Lisa's solution: an intensive, two-day beauty treatment for Ralph…and the barn for Oliver!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) takes to his soap box, delivering fiery, patriotic speeches after getting a bill from the State Farm Unattached Duty Tax for an outrageous $12.03! But no one can figure out why the tax is levied in the first place.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: With a lot of demands on Mike and Gloria's time - Joey needs a lot of care, and both of them working - the Stivics begin wondering when...or if they'll ever have time for each other.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is determined to baptize Joey, especially over Mike's express wishes against it. When Edith begins refusing to allow Archie to be with Joey alone (knowing what will happen), Archie begins getting very sneaky.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Archie and Edith's furnace breaks down, they temporarily move in with Gloria and Mike. An already tense situation is made even more so thanks to a power blackout that rapidly spreads throughout the neighborhood.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie finds himself in a compromising situation with an attractive waitress after Edith ignores his amorous advances and dashes off to the Sunshine Home.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: A famed psychic predicts four things will happen to Maude -- the fourth prediction being that she will marry a fifth time. At first, Maude scoffs at the predictions, but then begins to worry when the first three come true.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Would you believe Maude as the college campus queen doing a striptease? That's what happens when Maude gives a New Year's Eve party and insists the guests come dressed as their favorite year.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The Findlays and their friends rejoin the world of 'showbiz' when Tuckahoe's Gallbladder Foundation enlists Maude to produce their charity telethon.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Carol's in love and Maude couldn't be happier -- until she learns Carol's 'intended' already has a wife and she happens to be one of Maude's oldest friends.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude recruits Vivian into women's liberation and possible out of her marriage. Arthur takes a dim view of anything that might keep Vivian away from her 'daily chores' and warns her that her 'revolutionary' attitude may be destroying their marriage.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck's strange behavior worries the Findlays until she tells them she's in love and plans to get married. Maude plans a surprise bridal shower for Mrs. Naugatuck, but there's an even bigger surprise in store for everyone.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix turns to Oscar for help after complaining he no longer can communicate with his daughter.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix plans a surprise birthday party for Oscar -who loathes birthday parties.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar tells Myrna the story of why Felix has been banned from Midtown Memorial Hospital ever since his daughter's birth in The First Baby.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Allen invites Oscar to be a celebrity contestant on his ABC show, and eager Felix persuades him to accept the offer and to take him along as his partner.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve Douglas (Fred MacMurray) and his youngest son, Chip (Stanley Livingston), are caught in the snares of designing women (Patricia Barry and Debbie Megowan), respectively.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip collects items for the school's annual rag drive. One neighbor notices all the strange happenings at the Douglas home. Bub appears drunk, Robbie carries a dummy in the house, and Chip talks to the dummy and drops it out the window.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Bub tries to fit into family life, but the boys find things difficult when Bub speaks against a PTA mother, shows up at school with a forgotten lunch, and seems to interfere with girlfriends. Turns out, all the help was needed.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A telecast of a countdown to a 1957 satellite launch provides the backdrop for a Monday morning in the Douglas household. Everyone seems to be unusually tired.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba learns the disappointing truth that Eddie Larran, the country singer he idolizes, might have stolen his biggest hit, leaving his former writing partner, Ace McCabe, with none of the wealth derived from the song. Robert Goulet guest stars.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Serena Grimes, the victim of a violent armed robbery, becomes obsessed with Bubba Skinner when she misinterprets his kindness for romance. Soon, flowers arrive at the station for Bubba, amusing Gillespie and the staff, until the stalking begins.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: One of the girlfriends of a young charmer learns that he has robbed a bank.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Keller investigate the death of a cop who dies during a drug sting—and tries to prevent the cop's partner from doing any more damage.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A sniper is randomly shooting people in a high-rise building and threatens to continue doing it until he is paid a million dollars.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The wife of a prison inmate is shot and killed in a laundromat in what looks like a professional hit.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After Jeannie's friend Nancy kills one of her rapists, Jeannie is furious at the way the justice system works.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix must find the kidnapped daughter of a Palm Springs mobster.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A potential candidate for governor employs Interect to probe his background. He believes that if the detective agency can't find dirt on him, then his political opponents won't.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix reluctantly agrees to pursue a divorce case -- the woman involved is an old flame of his. The detective ends up being framed for murder.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A young girl wants to `rent a detective' to prove her father, who is on Death Row, is innocent. Mannix takes the case in his own time and must solve it without Intertect's help.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An aging star of the stage trying to make a comeback is being terrorized by someone who doesn't want to see that happen. Barnaby is hired by her agent to sift through the long list of possible suspects.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A mentally unstable young man who was declared innocent of murder by reason of insanity several years ago is once again suspected of murder. It's up to Barnaby to prove him innocent of being who authorities are calling "The Orchid Killer".

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby looks into the alleged accidental death of an investigative reporter and soon discovers that it is a case of murder. He also believes that there may be another murder directly related to the case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Amanda wins a contest to appear on her favorite daytime TV drama The Young and The Restless, just about everyone at Community General Hospital tries to wrangle an invitation to join her on the set.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Mrs. Briggs talks about her husband's disappearance into the woods. Nadine is put on the wrestling team, where she falls for Mike Nelson. James is hired by a mysterious wealthy woman named Evelyn Marsh. Dick takes on an orphan named Little Nicky.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Ben takes Bobby under his wing in a hope to destroy Hank and Jean. However, Ben's mental state is starting to crack. Cooper starts to look at buying real estate. Major Briggs's supervisor reveals that Briggs was studying transmissions from the woods.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Major Briggs has no memory of the place he was taken, but now has an odd tattoo on his neck. Andy and Dick break into Little Nicky's files. Mike and Nadine begin an affair. Shelly and Bobby's love is strained. Evelyn asks James to kill her husband.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: A Colombian drug dealer is murdered, and police informant Sporty James becomes the prime suspect, hunted by both Hunter and the criminals.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of the stabbing of a deaf man hinges on cryptic clues the victim gave in sign language before he died.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The wife of a businessman who was killed in an explosion on his yacht becomes the prime suspect when Hunter and McCall discover that she was recently removed from his will.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A friendly-fire incident involving a veteran cop leaves Steve's friend dead, but the shooting only appears to be unintentional.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse and Dr. Sloan have contact with a contagious victim of a genetically altered smallpox strain.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A skater stages an attack on herself to win endorsements, then ices her accomplice---and frames her rival for the killing.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trivette leads the investigation when a little girl is kidnapped. The mother relies on a psychic so Trivette must work with the psychic. It seems the psychic does have the ability to sense things, and together they find the girl.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex sends Walker and Trivette to go bring back a man who killed a ranger who was sent bring him in. Walker is sullen; it seems that the ranger who was killed was a friend of his and that Walker was the one who was suppose to bring the man in.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Cordell and Trivette go undercover to try and catch a bunch of big rig hijackers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette track a group of brothers who are robbing and assaulting people across the county. The deeper into the back country they go, it gets more difficult for Walker and Trivette. Worried, CD goes to help.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: A dispute over whether an apple tree belongs to the D'Arcys or the Bundy's leads to a feud between the two families.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al will get a new Viper for his Dodge if he lets people film a video of the Dodge crossing the 1 million mile mark. Meanwhile, Kelly tries to find Waldo.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bud tries to find an old valentine, whose letter Kelly forgot to give him years ago. Meanwhile, Al shops for Valentine's Day gifts to give to Peggy.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al's high school football field will be destroyed for an auto shop, so he protests. Meanwhile, Kelly tests a new bug spray on Bud and Buck, which has unwanted effects.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al is offered $50,000 dollars to reveal the identity of Jefferson, who is revealed to be a spy.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al loses his precious parking space after insulting a fat woman, which leads to "No Ma'am" seeking out to find a guru, Ironhead Haynes, and seek his advice.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al arranges for an aerobics studio to open next to the shoe store.

programme.title: Married... With Children

programme.title: Dennis the Menace

programme.title: Dennis the Menace

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson has written a book about his Uncle Ned's life, but Ned does not want the book to be published.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace

programme.desc: The family puts Kathy in charge of Bud's lawn mowing company.

programme.desc: As part of a school assignment, Bud must do a good deed. The experience turns him into a cynic.

programme.title: Family Affair

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Cissy is excited to have her friend over, who she sees as very sophisticated and envies her glamorous lifestyle until her friend reveals that her parents are separated and all she really wants is a loving family like Cissy has.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: The kids overhear Bill talking about one of his bridges collapsing. He goes to the construction site to help with the disaster. The kids think they are going to lose all their money to help pay for the bridge.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Gayle Isleib, de 54 años, fue emboscada en su camino de entrada de Manchester, Connecticut, y asesinada a tiros. Ahora la policía debe determinar si el amor se convirtió en obsesión... y en un motivo de asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Manchas delatoras
programme.desc: La policía instituyó una búsqueda intensa cuando la madre de dos niños pequeños desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Darlene Vander Giesen recibió correos electrónicos amenazantes y luego desapareció. Rastrear los correos electrónicos llevó a la policía a la casa de Daphne Wright, donde creen que se cometió un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Valiree Jackson, de 9 años, desapareció camino a la escuela cerca de Spokane. Su padre, Brad Jackson, denunció la desaparición y toda la comunidad comenzó a buscar a su secuestrador.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Rhoda Nathan fue encontrada asesinada en una habitación de un hotel en Cincinnati.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el secretario de la corte, Peter Porco, no se presenta a trabajar en noviembre de 2004, se ordena a un oficial de la corte que se dirija a la casa familiar de los Porcos en Bethlehem, Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres desaparecieron y luego fueron encontradas brutalmente asesinadas, la policía se preguntó si fueron víctimas de un crimen de odio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un joven sano muere misteriosamente mientras duerme y las pruebas de toxicología revelan una dosis letal de lidocaína en su sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cazador de Colorado que había recibido tres disparos fue víctima de un crimen bien planeado. Los investigadores sospecharon dos armas y dos asesinos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Matan a un hombre joven en un misterioso accidente vehicular, pero la evidencia en la escena lleva a los investigadores a creer que no fue un accidente. La ciencia forense reveló lo que pasó realmente y la verdad es devastadora para tres familias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre la muerte de un veterano de la Segunda Guerra Mundial se detuvo por completo cuando el sospechoso principal tenía una cortada sólida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved, and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the Hyaenodon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: The lives of cavemen were nasty, brutish and short, but somehow they evolved over 3.5 million years into Homo sapiens.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: Two very different species compete for survival in Africa 2,000,000 years ago.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangaea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes to the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpark in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Old and new cases that show the process for adopting a dog, introducing one to the home, setting rules and boundaries and dealing with the loss of a pet.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward people and dogs; a dachshund mix exhibits aggression at feeding time and when it comes time to trim his nails.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender, with a long record, ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter: Baby's Back in Town
programme.desc: Dog tries to nab a fugitive, named Wayne, by calling and telling him that he's won a new vacuum cleaner and he should stick around to get it. Dog then sends his daughter, Lyssa, to "deliver" the vacuum cleaner and lure Wayne out of his house.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven and Claudia marry, and the judge dismisses the custody suit; Blake offers Krystle a public relations job; Adam tricks Alexis into signing blank documents; Fallon and Jeff uncover evidence suggesting Adam may have poisoned Jeff.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam frames Alexis for the poisoning incident, and Blake threatens to take the story public; Mark attacks Krystle; Denver-Carrington's publicist Tracy is disappointed that Krystle has been appointed department head.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff accuses Alexis of attempting to murder him and reclaims his stock; Mark is hired as Alexis' bodyguard; Dex Dexter, the son of a board member, proposes that he and Alexis form a business alliance.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex continues his efforts to win Alexis; Jeff learns Adam raped Kirby; Krystle relishes her own publicity post; Fallon meets a dashing millionaire at the track.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex beats Alexis to an oil contract; Jeff confronts Adam about Kirby's pregnancy; Krystle accepts Blake's marriage proposal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Krystle are to wed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam proposes marriage to Kirby, who intends to divorce Jeff; Tracy persuades Krystle to give her the company credit cards and confidential files; Peter makes a pass at Claudia; and Krystle and Blake are remarried.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A stranger greets little Danny by name; worried, Claudia moves the family into the mansion; Peter DeVilbis's architect hints at the playboy's drug problem; Kirby's hand swells uncontrollably.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby's health problems continue; Peter urges Fallon to try cocaine; Tracy sabotages Krystle at the office to gain Blake's favor; Allegre, the racehorse, is stolen; Claudia receives violets from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake receives a ransom note for the return of his horse; Peter announces Fallon will be his wife; Dex and Alexis mix business with pleasure; Kirby suffers a seizure.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake grows suspicious of Peter DeVilbis; Claudia receives more violets from 'Lancelot'; Adam tells Blake the truth of the poisoning incident; after suffering a seizure, Kirby undergoes emergency surgery and loses her baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Allegre is returned, and Blake's suspicions about Peter's involvement are founded; Tracy orchestrates a press campaign to ruin Krystle; learning her fiancé has left the country, Fallon dashes from the hotel and is struck by a truck.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Peter DeVilbis, caught while trying to leave the country, is arrested for possession of drugs and jailed; Blake is offered a political post; Fallon regains consciousness and learns she is paralyzed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to bribe Kirby to prevent her from marrying Adam; Claudia receives another package from her late husband; Fallon remains unable to walk, until her child's life is in danger.

programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.
